queries.question: Give me the platform names that are at each train station.
queries.sql: SELECT Platforms.Name  from Train_Stations_Platforms join Platforms on Train_Stations_Platforms.PlatformID = Platforms.PlatformID join Train_Stations on Train_Stations_Platforms.StationID = Train_Stations.StationID   GROUP BY Train_Stations_Platforms.PlatformID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Train_Stations_Platforms.StationID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Train_Stations)

queries.question: Give me the platform names that are at each train station.
queries.sql: select train_stations.name , platforms.name from Train_Stations_Platforms join Platforms on Train_Stations_Platforms.PlatformID = Platforms.PlatformID join Train_Stations on Train_Stations_Platforms.StationID = Train_Stations.StationID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?train_stations_platforms a :Train_Stations_Platforms .
  ?platforms a :Platforms .
  ?train_stations_platforms p:hasPlatforms ?platforms .
  ?train_stations a :Train_Stations .
  ?train_stations_platforms p:hasTrain_Stations ?train_stations .
  ?train_stations p:name ?name .
  ?platforms p:name ?name2 .
}
